title: mitragyna parvifolia var. parvifolia
intro: Mitragyna parvifolia var. parvifolia, also known as the Thai kratom or Thai mitragyna, is a plant species of the Rubiaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mitragyna parvifolia var. parvifolia include relief from pain and fatigue, improved mood and cognitive function, and potential management of symptoms associated with anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of Mitragyna parvifolia var. parvifolia include tea, capsules, and powders, which can be consumed orally for its medicinal and health benefits.
